prompt_task: From the given ENCFF822FDB.bigWig file corresponding to an ENCODE DNase-seq experiment in mouse brain (mm10), find the 1Mbp interval with the 3rd highest total signal intensity. Consider only those intervals that start at multiples of 1Mbp, and ignore intervals at chromosome ends that are smaller than 1Mbp. Consider only chromosomes 1-19. Report as 0-based coordinates in chr:start-end format (no commas). Run the analysis inside the Galaxy environment.
